name: Mean Lean Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can (about 1 lb) pinto beans (or 3 cans of one kind)
1/2 cup sour cream or yogurt (crushed dried hot peppers)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4- to 5-quart pan over high heat, combine carrots and onion.
2. Cook, stirring often, until the vegetables begin to brown and stick to the pan, about 10 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes (breaking them up with a spoon) and their liquid, beans and their liquid, and chili powder.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for about 15 minutes to blend flavors.
5. Ladle the chili into wide bowls; add sour cream and crushed chilies to taste.
6. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Per serving: 228 calories (17% from fat); 4.3 grams fat, 863 mg sodium, and 6.3 grams cholesterol.
